allow: Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\)\); ['ws','hono','fast-uri','ip-address','uuid','brace-expansion'].forEach\(p => { const pkg = d.packages['node_modules/'+p]; if\(pkg\) console.log\(p+'@'+pkg.version\); }\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(k,':',v\) for k,v in p.get\('scripts',{}\).items\(\)]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('jobs:', len\(d.get\('jobs',[]\)\), '| queue:', d.get\('queue',{}\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('version:', p['version']\); print\('name:', p['name']\); print\('main:', p.get\('main','?'\)\); print\('publishConfig:', p.get\('publishConfig','none'\)\)")
